repro_band6065_dedup.label: filter-first dedup, drift>=4, p in [0.60,0.65) (claimed n=89)

reconcile_mom_6066_all.label: mom all fills 60-66c (merge agent cited -1.29c n=1227)

cell_ledgeronly.label: in ruleA cell but candle drift <4bps or missing

cell_both.label: in cell under BOTH drift definitions

perm_scanmax.note: trade-level shuffle of drift within 5c price band; ignores time clustering (anti-conservative)

perm_zmax_tradelevel.note: P(max cell z over grid >= observed max z) under within-band drift shuffle

perm_fixedcell_tradelevel.note: P(cell 60-65 drift>=4 z >= observed) — no selection, drift-increment test

perm_zmax_hourblock.note: hour-vector reassignment within band (size-matched); preserves within-hour drift correlation

VERDICT.reproduction: exact: n=71 q=.8169 +14.0c (p>=0.60) and n=89 q=.7865 +14.27c ([0.60,0.65)); claim conflates the two (quotes q=.817 from the first with q*=.644 from the second, and mislabels n=71 as [0.60,0.65))

significance.claimed: block-boot p_le0=0.0005, survives x8 and <0.05 at ~x40
significance.honest_raw: exact binomial vs per-trade q*: p=0.0063 (n=71) / 0.0026 (n=89) — bootstrap overstated ~10-30x; 0.0063 x40 = 0.25, so the x40 claim fails
significance.selection_corrected: z-max permutation over the searched grid (12 viable cells, drift shuffled within 5c price band): p=0.024 trade-level / 0.008 hour-block; fixed-cell drift-increment p=0.002-0.006. Survives the declared scan, but only marginally once the wider autopsy search (calibration views, sec-x-drift grid, dedup and band variants; effective K~40-80) is priced in: ~0.04-0.10
significance.split_test: cell [0.60,0.65) drift>=4 is selected as best in all 4 two-day splits; out-of-fold EV +9.5/+19.3/+20.2/+5.9c — stable WITHIN the 4-day retired era, no forward data exists (v3 caps 53c)

VERDICT.lookahead_check: NOT a data-alignment artifact: bot tick fetches spot feed BEFORE the CLOB book, so the recorded ask is fresher than btcEntry; fills walk a real depth ladder (fillFrac p50=1.0, stake $50 fully filled). The cheap asks really rested there at snapshot time.
VERDICT.mechanism_check: BROKEN as stated: same signal at cheaper asks is strongly NEGATIVE (55-60c: n=31 dedup, q=.419, -18.2c; 50-55c: n=7, -25.6c). If the edge were generic stale-ask capture, cheaper lagging asks should be more profitable. The ask level itself is highly informative; the 60c boundary is post-hoc. 65-75c is mildly positive (+4.6c, n=120).
VERDICT.freshness_decomposition: signal lives sub-minute: recomputing drift from independent cb1m minute opens (strictly pre-decision) keeps only 19/71 cell members and yields +4.4c, CI [-4.5,+13.4], p=0.17 — the edge requires the bot-feed sub-minute freshness vs a still-cheap quote, i.e. exactly the quote-staleness window
VERDICT.deployability: entire edge is execution-model-dependent: independent PM snapshots price the drift side .72-.78 in this state (p60|drift4-8 EV -0.74c/share) vs ledger fills at .63. Paper assumes every cancel-race vs MMs is won; live capture rate and its adverse selection are unknown. entrySec p50=25s fills.
VERDICT.reconciliation: pooled mom 60-66c: -1.25c/share n=1,244 (matches merge agent). Same fill model loses on the band overall; only the drift slice wins, complement (drift<4) is -3.58c.
VERDICT.corrected_effect: paper fills: ~+8-12c/share after winner-curse shrinkage (out-of-fold range +6 to +20c), selection-corrected p~0.02-0.08, Jul 7-10 only; live tradable edge: unproven, plausibly ~0 until the $0-stake leader_v1 fill-conformance data exists
VERDICT.action_on_claim: the proposed action (measurement-only engine, promote only after live fill realism conformance) is appropriate and survives; the +14c headline and the multiplicity/mechanism claims do not survive at face value
